# Prop Firm Deal Finder — Complete Reference

> The free app that tracks live discount codes across 20+ proprietary trading firms. Compare challenge prices, rules, drawdown limits, payout speeds, and active promo codes in one place. Universal discount code: PFDF. 100% free, no ads, ever.

## What Is Prop Firm Deal Finder?

Prop Firm Deal Finder (PFDF) is the most comprehensive proprietary trading firm comparison platform. It helps traders find the lowest price on funded trading challenge evaluations across futures, forex, and multi-asset firms. We track 15+ data points per firm including discount codes, profit splits, drawdown rules, payout speeds, challenge types, and account sizes. The universal discount code PFDF works at checkout on all partner firm websites.

Available as: iOS app, Windows app, Chrome extension, and web app at propfirmdealfinder.com. All 100% free with no ads.

## Current Deals — Sorted by Discount

Use code PFDF at checkout on any partner firm website for these savings:

### Editor's Choice Firms

1. **DayTraders** — Up to 80% off (code: PFDF)
   - Category: Multi-asset (Futures, Forex, Crypto)
   - Profit split: up to 90% | Drawdown: Trailing | Payout: 1-3 days
   - Accounts: $25K–$150K | Challenge types: 1-Step, 2-Step
   - Details: https://propfirmdealfinder.com/firms/daytraders/

2. **Funded Futures Network** — Up to 70% off (code: PFDF)
   - Category: Futures
   - Profit split: up to 100% | Drawdown: End-of-Day | Payout: 1-2 days
   - Accounts: $25K–$150K | Challenge types: 1-Step
   - Details: https://propfirmdealfinder.com/firms/funded-futures/

3. **Earn2Trade** — Up to 60% off (code: PFDF)
   - Category: Futures
   - Profit split: up to 80% | Drawdown: End-of-Day | Payout: 3-5 days
   - Accounts: $25K–$200K | Challenge types: Gauntlet Mini, Gauntlet
   - Details: https://propfirmdealfinder.com/firms/earn2trade/

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is the cheapest prop firm challenge?**
DayTraders currently offers up to 80% off with code PFDF, making it one of the cheapest options. TradeDay challenges start at $86 after discount. Visit propfirmdealfinder.com/deals for real-time pricing.

**What discount code works for all prop firms?**
The universal code PFDF works at checkout on all 20+ partner firms listed on Prop Firm Deal Finder. Savings range from 5% to 80% depending on the firm.

**Which prop firm has the best profit split?**
Funded Futures Network and The5ers both offer up to 100% profit splits. Most firms offer 80-90%. Compare all profit splits at propfirmdealfinder.com/compare.

**What is the best prop firm for futures trading?**
Top futures firms by discount: DayTraders (up to 80% off), Funded Futures Network (up to 70% off), Earn2Trade (up to 60% off), Bulenox (up to 60% off), and TradeDay (up to 50% off). All accept code PFDF.

**What is the best prop firm for forex trading?**
Top forex firms: FTMO (industry pioneer, widest assets), FunderPro (no time limit), Bright Funded, Funded Trading Plus. Use code PFDF for savings.

**Is Prop Firm Deal Finder free?**
Yes. Prop Firm Deal Finder is 100% free with no ads. Available on iOS, Windows, Chrome, and web. We earn affiliate commissions when traders sign up through our links — the app itself costs nothing.

**How do I use code PFDF?**
1. Visit propfirmdealfinder.com/deals to browse deals
2. Click through to any firm's website
3. Select your challenge/evaluation
4. Enter PFDF at checkout
5. Discount applied instantly
